query: What EXEC CICS commands are most common?

results.name: RETURN-TO-CICS
results.preamble:
File: CORPT00C.cbl
Program: CORPT00C - CICS COBOL Program - Print Transaction reports by submitting batch
Paragraph: RETURN-TO-CICS (lines 585-595)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY CORPT00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
results.summary: paragraph RETURN-TO-CICS in CORPT00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, CORPT00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
RETURN-TO-CICS.

           EXEC CICS RETURN
                     TRANSID (WS-TRANID)
                     COMMAREA (CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
      *              LENGTH(LENGTH OF CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      RECEIVE-TRNRPT-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COPAUS0C.cbl
Program: COPAUS0C - CICS COBOL IMS BMS Program - Summary View of Authoriation Messages
Paragraph: RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN (lines 665-680)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COPAU00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CIPAUSMY, COPY CIPAUDTY, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
results.summary: paragraph RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN in COPAUS0C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COPAU00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y....
results.content:
RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN.
      *****************************************************************

           IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-CICS-TRANID  TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
           MOVE WS-PGM-AUTH-SMRY TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
           MOVE ZEROS           TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
           EXEC CICS
               XCTL PROGRAM(CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM)
               COMMAREA(CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.


      *****************************************************************

results.name: 2100-RECEIVE-SCREEN, 2100-RECEIVE-SCREEN-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COCRDLIC.cbl
Program: COCRDLIC - Business logic - List Credit Cards
Paragraph: 2100-RECEIVE-SCREEN, 2100-RECEIVE-SCREEN-EXIT (lines 962-984)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDLI, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y
results.summary: paragraph 2100-RECEIVE-SCREEN, 2100-RECEIVE-SCREEN-EXIT in COCRDLIC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
2100-RECEIVE-SCREEN.                                                     
           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP(LIT-THISMAP)                                   
                          MAPSET(LIT-THISMAPSET)                                
                          INTO(CCRDLIAI)                                        
                          RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                      
           END-EXEC                                                             
                                                                                
           MOVE ACCTSIDI OF CCRDLIAI  TO CC-ACCT-ID                             
           MOVE CARDSIDI OF CCRDLIAI  TO CC-CARD-NUM                            
                                                                                
           MOVE CRDSEL1I OF CCRDLIAI  TO WS-EDIT-SELECT(1)                      
           MOVE CRDSEL2I OF CCRDLIAI  TO WS-EDIT-SELECT(2)                      
           MOVE CRDSEL3I OF CCRDLIAI  TO WS-EDIT-SELECT(3)                      
           MOVE CRDSEL4I OF CCRDLIAI  TO WS-EDIT-SELECT(4)                      
           MOVE CRDSEL5I OF CCRDLIAI  TO WS-EDIT-SELECT(5)                      
           MOVE CRDSEL6I OF CCRDLIAI  TO WS-EDIT-SELECT(6)                      
           MOVE CRDSEL7I OF CCRDLIAI  TO WS-EDIT-SELECT(7)                      
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       2100-RECEIVE-SCREEN-EXIT.                                                
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
results.preamble:
File: COSGN00C.cbl
Program: COSGN00C - CICS COBOL Program - Signon Screen for the CardDemo Application
Paragraph: POPULATE-HEADER-INFO (lines 177-208)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COSGN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
results.summary: paragraph POPULATE-HEADER-INFO in COSGN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COSGN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
POPULATE-HEADER-INFO.

           MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA

           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COSGN0AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COSGN0AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COSGN0AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COSGN0AO

           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY

           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COSGN0AO

           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS

           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COSGN0AO

           EXEC CICS ASSIGN
               APPLID(APPLIDO OF COSGN0AO)
           END-EXEC

           EXEC CICS ASSIGN
               SYSID(SYSIDO OF COSGN0AO)
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      READ-USER-SEC-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: MAIN-PARA
results.preamble:
File: CORPT00C.cbl
Program: CORPT00C - CICS COBOL Program - Print Transaction reports by submitting batch
Paragraph: MAIN-PARA (lines 163-207)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY CORPT00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY, PERFORM RECEIVE-TRNRPT-SCREEN, PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN, PERFORM SEND-TRNRPT-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph MAIN-PARA in CORPT00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, CORPT00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY, PERFORM RECEIVE-TRNRPT-SCREEN, PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN, PERFORM SEND-TRNRPT-SCREEN.
results.content:
MAIN-PARA.

           SET ERR-FLG-OFF TO TRUE
           SET TRANSACT-NOT-EOF TO TRUE
           SET SEND-ERASE-YES TO TRUE

           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF CORPT0AO

           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO CORPT0AO
                   MOVE -1       TO MONTHLYL OF CORPT0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNRPT-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-TRNRPT-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           MOVE 'COMEN01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE -1       TO MONTHLYL OF CORPT0AI
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-TRNRPT-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF

           EXEC CICS RETURN
                     TRANSID (WS-TRANID)
                     COMMAREA (CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.


      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 1500-SEND-SCREEN, 1500-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COCRDLIC.cbl
Program: COCRDLIC - Business logic - List Credit Cards
Paragraph: 1500-SEND-SCREEN, 1500-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT (lines 938-950)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDLI, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y
results.summary: paragraph 1500-SEND-SCREEN, 1500-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT in COCRDLIC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1500-SEND-SCREEN.                                                        
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP(LIT-THISMAP)                                      
                          MAPSET(LIT-THISMAPSET)                                
                          FROM(CCRDLIAO)                                        
                          CURSOR                                                
                          ERASE                                                 
                          RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                      
                          FREEKB                                                
           END-EXEC                                                             
           .                                                                    
       1500-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT.                                                   
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.content:
RECEIVE-MENU-SCREEN.                                                     
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS RECEIVE                                                    
                     MAP('COADM1A')                                             
                     MAPSET('COADM01')                                          
                     INTO(COADM1AI)                                             
                     RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                           
                     RESP2(WS-REAS-CD)                                          
           END-EXEC.                                                            
                                                                                
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*        
      *                      POPULATE-HEADER-INFO                               
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: SEND-TRNRPT-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: CORPT00C.cbl
Program: CORPT00C - CICS COBOL Program - Print Transaction reports by submitting batch
Paragraph: SEND-TRNRPT-SCREEN (lines 556-584)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY CORPT00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
results.summary: paragraph SEND-TRNRPT-SCREEN in CORPT00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, CORPT00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
SEND-TRNRPT-SCREEN.

           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO

           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF CORPT0AO

           IF SEND-ERASE-YES
               EXEC CICS SEND
                         MAP('CORPT0A')
                         MAPSET('CORPT00')
                         FROM(CORPT0AO)
                         ERASE
                         CURSOR
               END-EXEC
           ELSE
               EXEC CICS SEND
                         MAP('CORPT0A')
                         MAPSET('CORPT00')
                         FROM(CORPT0AO)
      *                  ERASE
                         CURSOR
               END-EXEC
           END-IF.

           GO TO RETURN-TO-CICS.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                         RETURN-TO-CICS
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
